haven — documentation

Configuration repository managed by strata.

haven is the infrastructure and application configuration for the family platform: a two-node Hetzner setup (Core VPS on Docker Compose + Workload VPS on k3s), with Infomaniak kSuite for email and files, and INWX for DNS.
